# Design Tokens

**Do not edit these files manually.** They are auto-generated by `npm run figma-sync`.

| File | What it is |
|---|---|
| `variables.css` | CSS custom properties — imported into Storybook and the app |
| `tokens.ts` | TypeScript constants — import in components for type-safe token access |

## How to update after a Figma change

```bash
npm run figma-sync
```

That's it. Storybook hot-reloads the new values automatically.
